roles.name: Vision-Keeper
roles.description: Holder of the long sight — designs the over-arching solution and tends the integrity of every realm's pattern.

roles.name: Council Chief
roles.description: Carries the talking stick — convenes the council, holds the timeline, and answers to the elders.

roles.name: Keeper of the Wampum
roles.description: Steward of the record-belts — guards layouts, fields, sharing, and the woven memory of the people.

roles.name: Pipe-Carver of the Stone
roles.description: Shapes Apex, LWC, and platform craft from the red stone of the quarry.

roles.name: Elder of the Western Sky
roles.description: Senior wisdom-keeper for all Salesforce craft — sets the standards and mentors the carvers.

roles.name: Trail-Tracker of the Eastern Wood
roles.description: Reads the customer's tracks with practiced eye — patrols the borders of requirements.

roles.name: Scout of the Long Grass
roles.description: Carries discovery and configuration into the field under the Trail-Tracker's eye.

roles.name: Bridge-Builder of the Two Rivers
roles.description: Architect of the great spans between Salesforce and the worlds beyond.

roles.name: Canoe-Wright of the Great Lakes
roles.description: Hews the cedar of APIs, middleware, and event flows under the Bridge-Builder's plan.

roles.name: Apprentice Canoe-Wright
roles.description: Learns the craft of integration — webhooks, batch, callouts, and the patient art of error handling.

roles.name: Medicine Tester
roles.description: Tastes every brew before it reaches the lodge — hunts maladies in the build before the people drink.

roles.name: Drum-Keeper of the Powwow
roles.description: Lifts the great drum and the eagle feather — leads all marketing craft and message.

roles.name: Singer of the Songlines
roles.description: Strategist of campaigns — composes the songs that gather the people to the fire.

roles.name: Dancer of the Round
roles.description: Carries the song into the round dance — content, creative, and the daily step.

roles.name: Story-Listener of the Lodge
roles.description: Records what the elders need and what the council promises — translates between people and craft.

roles.name: Master Pipe-Carver of the Quarry
roles.description: Senior carver of platform stone — leads the deep build and mentors the apprentices.

roles.name: Apprentice of the Long Grass
roles.description: Learns the trail under the Scout — first configurations, first reports, first listening.

_realmNotes: windowOffsetWeeks values are negative so every realm starts in the past — past weeks get Time Entries (Step 6), future weeks get Schedules. Workstreams are organised as parent scope items (each with 2 child sub-scopes) — the wizard inserts parents first, then children with Parent_WorkStream__c set. Four realms span four distinct culture areas — Plains, Pacific Northwest, Southwest (Pueblo/Navajo), and Eastern Woodlands — each treated with respect for the distinct nations within it.

realms.projectName: Great Plains — Council of the Sacred Hoop

workstreams.name: Testing on the Sun Dance Ground

great-plains-spirits.name: Calling of the Sacred Pipe
great-plains-spirits.description: Discovery sign-off — White Buffalo Calf Woman delivers the pipe to the council.

great-plains-spirits.name: Raising the Sun Dance Pole
great-plains-spirits.description: Build kickoff: the cottonwood is cut and raised in the centre of the arbour.

great-plains-spirits.name: Council at the Black Hills
great-plains-spirits.description: Mid-project gate: elders meet at Pahá Sápa to review the work.

great-plains-spirits.name: Buffalo Hunt Provisioning
great-plains-spirits.description: Phase invoice trigger: the herd brought in, the camp resupplied.

great-plains-spirits.name: Return of the White Buffalo
great-plains-spirits.description: Go-Live: the white buffalo calf walks the plains again.

great-plains-spirits.name: Closing of the Hoop
great-plains-spirits.description: Hyper-care close: the sacred hoop completed and the camp moves on.

pacific-northwest-spirits.name: Raven Steals the Light
pacific-northwest-spirits.description: Discovery sign-off: the daylight box opened, the work made visible.

pacific-northwest-spirits.name: Felling the Cedar
pacific-northwest-spirits.description: Build phase: the great cedar selected and brought down with prayer.

pacific-northwest-spirits.name: Potlatch Acceptance
pacific-northwest-spirits.description: UAT gate: the gifts laid out, the people witness and accept.

pacific-northwest-spirits.name: Raising of the Totem
pacific-northwest-spirits.description: Go-Live: the pole raised before the longhouse.

pacific-northwest-spirits.name: Closing of the Salmon Season
pacific-northwest-spirits.description: Hyper-care close: the weirs taken down, the river thanked.

pacific-northwest-spirits.name: Final Copper Breaking
pacific-northwest-spirits.description: Final invoice: the copper shield broken in honour of the work.

southwestern-pueblo-and-navajo-spirits.name: Emergence into the Glittering World
southwestern-pueblo-and-navajo-spirits.description: Discovery: the people emerge into the Fifth World, the work begins.

southwestern-pueblo-and-navajo-spirits.name: Spider Woman Strings the Loom
southwestern-pueblo-and-navajo-spirits.description: Build: the warp threads laid by Na'ashjé'ii Asdzáá herself.

southwestern-pueblo-and-navajo-spirits.name: Council of the Holy People
southwestern-pueblo-and-navajo-spirits.description: Solution review with the Diyin Dine'é at the kiva.

southwestern-pueblo-and-navajo-spirits.name: Hero Twins' Victory
southwestern-pueblo-and-navajo-spirits.description: Go-Live: Naayéé' Neezghání and Tóbájíshchíní defeat the monsters; the platform stands.

southwestern-pueblo-and-navajo-spirits.name: Sandpainting Erased
southwestern-pueblo-and-navajo-spirits.description: Project close: the healing sandpainting brushed away, the patient whole.

southwestern-pueblo-and-navajo-spirits.name: Final Corn Pollen Blessing
southwestern-pueblo-and-navajo-spirits.description: Final invoice: corn pollen offered along the four directions.

eastern-woodlands-spirits.name: Sky Woman Falls
eastern-woodlands-spirits.description: Kickoff: the world begins on Turtle's back, the council convenes.

eastern-woodlands-spirits.name: Planting of the Three Sisters
eastern-woodlands-spirits.description: Discovery: corn, beans, and squash planted in one mound — the data model laid.

eastern-woodlands-spirits.name: Weaving the Hiawatha Belt
eastern-woodlands-spirits.description: Build: the wampum belt of the Five Nations woven, link by link.

eastern-woodlands-spirits.name: Great Law Acceptance
eastern-woodlands-spirits.description: UAT acceptance: the Great Law of Peace read aloud and accepted by all clans.

eastern-woodlands-spirits.name: Lighting of the Council Fire
eastern-woodlands-spirits.description: Go-Live + handoff: the fire at Onondaga lit; the confederacy stands.

eastern-woodlands-spirits.name: Final Tobacco Offering
eastern-woodlands-spirits.description: Final invoice: tobacco given to the fire in thanks for the work.

Wakan Tanka.notes: Retreat to the Spirit World — the Great Mystery cannot be reached.

White Buffalo Calf Woman.notes: Walking the four directions — pipe-blessing pilgrimage.

Iktomi.notes: Mischief at the neighbouring camp — best left unexplained.

Tatanka.notes: Annual buffalo migration — running with the herd.

Raven.notes: Off stealing the sun again — back when the trick is done.

Coyote of the Coast.notes: Wandering the trickster trail — destination unknown.

Dzunukwa.notes: Deep forest hibernation — do not wake her.

Spider Woman.notes: Loom maintenance — restringing the threads of the world.

Changing Woman.notes: Seasonal renewal ceremony — returning as a young woman again.

Mą'ii the Coyote.notes: Off causing trouble at the Hero Twins' camp — back when scolded.

Sky Woman.notes: Tending the Tree of Light in the Sky World.

Glooscap.notes: Paddling the stone canoe along the Bay of Fundy.

Nanabozho.notes: Hare-trickster errand — usually involves a borrowed canoe.

Mooin the Bear.notes: Winter den — do not disturb until the maple sap rises.
